title: Staff Training Program (STP) on “LibraOffice Suit Writer, Math, Cal & Impress”
content: Staff Training Program (STP) on “LibraOffice Suit Writer, Math, Cal & Impress” Staff Training Program on “LibraOffice Suit Writer, Math , Cal & Impress” is being organized by Department of Computer Science and Engineering and Information Technology, Jaypee University of Information Technology, Solan (HP) , during 8th to 28th June, 2017. This program will be useful to staff from all departments who are looking to improve and enrich the competance in the above areas. Broucher Time Table Registration Form List of Participants
